article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.13. CA - BVM Meadow and Tram Barn Plaza Improvements 2026-01-27.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on $1M contract for Burnaby Village Museum meadow and plaza upgrades
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on awarding a construction contract worth about $1,039,028 (including taxes) to Holaco Construction (1997) Ltd. to upgrade the meadow and Tram Barn Plaza at Burnaby Village Museum, adding a plaza surface, power and water hookups for food trucks and events, better drainage, lighting, and improved access.
briefs.action_required: If you operate a food truck or event business, watch for this approval — new vendor infrastructure may open opportunities at the museum.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Council vote — Burnaby Village Museum contract award decision
Burnaby 2026–2030 Financial Plan approval — project funding confirmed
